intro.title: Every Glow-Up Starts By
intro.subtitle: This aesthetic assessment uses technology and expert analysis to help you understand your features and explore non-surgical appearance improvements.
intro.expectComprehensiveBody: Understand your facial features and how they impact your overall appearance.
intro.expectVisualisationBody: See how subtle, measurement-guided changes could impact your overall appearance.
intro.expectPersonalisedBody: Every assessment accounts for your personal demographics for the most relevant insights.
intro.dataUsageBody: Your images are used only to deliver this assessment. Analysis is confidential and stored securely. Please refer to the Disclaimer section for full terms.
intro.journeyStart: We aim to empower you with knowledge you can trust. Let's begin your journey.

paragraphs.p1: In this report, MyFace has approached the commissioned facial analysis from a cephalometric point of view, taking soft tissue measurements and comparing them with established scientific reference ranges for facial harmony and proportion.
paragraphs.p2: This approach makes the report's findings less subjective where recommendations may vary from person to person.

paragraphs.p1: This report is provided for general informational and educational purposes only. It discusses topics related to facial aesthetics and wellness. It is not intended to constitute medical, clinical, or professional advice, diagnosis, or treatment of any kind.
paragraphs.p2: The information in this MyFace report is not a substitute for consultation with a qualified medical or healthcare professional. Readers should always seek appropriately licensed professional advice regarding any medical condition or treatment decision.
paragraphs.p3: MyFace makes no warranties regarding the accuracy or completeness of this report and disclaims liability arising from reliance on its contents. Any actions taken based on this report are at the reader's own risk.
paragraphs.p4: The purpose of this report is to help the reader understand facial features and how non-surgical recommendations could potentially impact appearance. Any reference to treatments is for informational context only.

privacy.p1: The subject's facial images and questionnaire responses are processed solely to generate this personalised assessment report.
privacy.p2: MyFace does not sell biometric data. Access is restricted to authorised reviewers for quality assurance before the report is approved.
privacy.p3: The subject may request deletion of assessment data by contacting support.
privacy.p4: Read the full privacy policy at myface.club.

protocolModel.limitations: Limitations apply: neutral head position, lighting, camera quality, and the absence of radiographic imaging may influence measurements. This report is not a medical diagnosis. Recommendations throughout should be taken as empirical guidelines grounded in the subject's facial measurements.

understandingResults.p1: These recommendations focus on key markers of facial health and harmony. The goal is not to change what makes the subject unique, but to understand what works best with the subject's existing features.
understandingResults.p2: MyFace does not rate attractiveness. The assessment highlights what works best for the subject's features using objective cephalometric measurements rather than a single universal standard.
understandingResults.p3: The protocol includes a mix of foundational and more advanced recommendations. Fundamentals such as SPF, sleep, and hydration support the effectiveness of more targeted guidance.
understandingResults.p4: All recommendations are for informational and aesthetic purposes only. Any in-clinic treatment or prescription product should be discussed with a qualified medical professional.

protocolModel.closingPending: Closing recommendations for this protocol are being prepared from the subject's stored measurements. Reopen the protocol after generation completes, or contact support if this message persists.

executiveSummary.heroBody: Scientific facial analysis and regional assessment grounded in measured morphology. Review the staged non-surgical protocol and prioritise refinements aligned to your harmonic profile.
executiveSummary.hinweis: Note: Recommendations are informational and non-invasive. Consult a qualified dermatologist before any clinical treatment.

fallback.summary: Harmonic indices indicate a structurally favorable baseline with localized refinement indicated in {zones}. Phase-one protocol emphasises photoprotection, barrier-supportive topicals, and OTC actives aligned to priority regions; subsequent phases escalate supervised topical rotation and long-term maintenance without procedural intervention.

executiveSummary.facialAgeVsBio: Facial Age vs. Biological Age Range
executiveSummary.fallbackNarrative: Your analysis shows excellent facial balance with targeted enhancement suggestions. Symmetry scores reside in the top percentiles. Focus recommended on nose width and jawline definition.

featureSection.protocolSubtitle: AI-generated recommendations based on your analysis

averageness.unavailable: Prototypicality data is not available for this assessment.
averageness.title: An overview of your
averageness.subtitle: Facial prototypicality describes how closely your features match the typical features of people in your demographic group.

dimorphism.title: An overview of your
dimorphism.subtitle: We're exploring how each of your facial features leans more masculine or feminine.
dimorphism.perFeatureSubtitle: These measurements best highlight the differences between your masculine and feminine features.

proportions.title: An overview of your
proportions.subtitle: Facial proportions refer to the size of each feature in relation to the rest of the face, which plays a key role in how harmonious the face looks.
proportions.perFeatureSubtitle: We've compared your facial proportionality with data specific to your demographic.

faceShape.title: An overview of your
faceShape.subtitle: We've assessed your face shape as a whole, considering natural variations and facial angles.

symmetry.title: An overview of your
symmetry.subtitle: We've assessed your facial symmetry as a whole, taking into account natural deviations and facial pose.
symmetry.regionalNote: Overall score already accounts for natural pose and left–right variation across these regions.

ears.title: Ear Analysis
ears.subtitle: Ear size, symmetry, and positioning relative to facial landmarks.
ears.earSizeTooltip: Ear size relative to interpupillary distance. Proportionate ears frame the face without drawing attention.
ears.sizeClassTooltip: Classification of ear size. Balanced ears contribute to harmonious facial framing.
ears.symmetryTooltip: Left-right ear size balance. Symmetric ears indicate balanced facial development.
ears.sizeDifferenceTooltip: Percentage difference between left and right ear size. Under 5% is considered symmetric.
ears.protrusionTooltip: How far the ears project from the head. Moderate protrusion creates a balanced silhouette.
ears.protrusionDepthTooltip: Z-depth measurement of ear protrusion from the facial plane.
ears.verticalPositionTooltip: Ear vertical alignment relative to facial features. Mid-set ears align with brow-to-nose base.

featureReport.subtitle: Facial landmark balance from your photos

brow.subtitle: Eyebrows are one of the most important facial features and play a key role in expressing emotion.

peak.body: Vertical distance from the brow peak to the top of the eye — measures how high the brow sits above the eye.

elevation.body: Brow-to-eye vertical gap divided by inter-pupillary distance. Higher = brow sits further above the eye.

apex.body: Angle at the brow peak between inner and outer brow vectors. Smaller angle = sharper, more defined arch.

eye.subtitle: The eyes are a focal point of facial harmony and play a key role in expressing emotion.

curvature.body: Sagitta/chord ratio measuring how curved the lower eyelid contour appears. Higher value = more rounded contour.

ear.body: EAR = vertical opening / horizontal width. Higher = more open, almond-shaped eye.

spacing.body: Interpupillary distance divided by facial width. Closer to 0.5 = eyes spaced at half the face width (classic aesthetic ideal).

jaw.subtitle: The jawline frames the lower face and contributes to overall harmony.

rise.body: Vertical drop from the gonion (jaw angle) to the menton (chin tip). Higher = more defined, angular jawline.

width.body: Bi-gonial width — the horizontal distance between both jaw angle landmarks.

angle.body: Average jaw inclination angle. Smaller = sharper V/U shape. Larger = more square jaw.

chin.subtitle: Chin width, projection, and depth balance the lower face and support overall harmony.

width.body: Horizontal distance between lateral chin points. Typical range 37–47 mm.

height.body: Distance from the lower lip base to the chin tip. Typical range 12–22 mm.

dev.body: How far the chin tip deviates from the nasion–nose-tip vertical axis. Ideal ≈ 0 mm.

smile.subtitle: Mouth width and smile-arc curvature shape expression and lower-face harmony.

upper.body: Sagitta / chord ratio of the upper smile arc. Higher = more upturned upper lip smile curve.

lower.body: Sagitta / chord ratio for the lower smile arc (lower lip). Indicates how curved the lower smile appears.

width.body: Mouth corner-to-corner width at rest. Typical range 40–60 mm.

neck.subtitle: Neck width and its proportion to the jaw support lower-face framing and overall harmony.

width.body: Horizontal span of the neck region from the segmentation mask. Typical range 80–100 mm.

ratio.body: Ratio of neck width to jaw width. Closer to 0.7–0.8 is typically considered proportionate.

nose.subtitle: The nose is a central pillar of facial aesthetics and plays a key role in overall harmony.

lips.subtitle: The lips frame expression and proportion in the lower face and contribute to overall harmony.

hair.subtitle: Hairline and forehead geometry frame the upper face and contribute to overall harmony.

cheek.subtitle: Cheekbones frame midface width and height and contribute to overall harmony.

skin.subtitle: Skin tone, texture and uniformity are analysed using LAB color science and Laplacian frequency analysis.

roughness.body: Your skin's roughness is estimated from Laplacian variance on skin pixels. Higher RIN means more fine textural grain at close range.

homogeneity.body: Colour homogeneity measured from standard deviation across LAB channels. Lower RIN = more even tone.

oiliness.body: Luminance skewness detects specular highlights from sebum. Positive skew → shiny/oily; negative → matte/dry.

underEye.body: Compares under-eye brightness against average face luminance. A lower ratio indicates dark circles.

skin.label: Skin Health
skin.description: Texture, tone, pores, and clarity analysis

antiAging.label: Anti-aging
antiAging.description: Fine lines, wrinkles, and age markers

refine.label: Refine and enhance my facial aesthetic

extreme.label: Extreme distress and affects my day to day

rarely.label: Rarely (a few times a week or less)

welcome.title: Your personalized facial analysis starts here
welcome.description: Answer a few quick questions so we can tailor your report to your goals, skin concerns, and demographics. Then upload a photo for AI-powered analysis.
welcome.sidebarDescription: Please answer the following questions to help us customize your MyFace journey.

questions.genderPreference: Would you rather look more masculine or more feminine?
questions.hadNonSurgical: Have you had any non-surgical aesthetic treatments before?
questions.hadSurgery: We're strictly non-surgical, but for accuracy, have you ever undergone facial cosmetic surgery?
questions.comfortableTreatments: Please select all treatment types you are comfortable undergoing:
questions.medicalConditions: Do you have any medical conditions (e.g. autoimmune disorders, diabetes)?
questions.medications: Are you taking any medications (prescription or over-the-counter)?
questions.usedRetinoids: Have you used retinoids (e.g. Isotretinoin / Accutane) in the past 6-12 months?
questions.allergies: Do you have any allergies (especially to skincare ingredients, lidocaine, latex, dyes)?
questions.activeInfections: Any active infections, cold sores, or skin conditions (e.g. Rosacea, Eczema, Psoriasis)?
questions.featureLike: What feature do you like the most about your face?
questions.featureDislike: What feature do you dislike the most about your face?
questions.celebrityMatch: Are there any celebrities' facial aesthetics that you'd like to look like?
questions.comfortableWeightLoss: Are you comfortable with weight loss recommendations?
questions.growBeard: Can you grow a full beard?
questions.aestheticDistress: How much distress does your current facial aesthetic cause you?
questions.appearanceFrequency: How often do you think about your appearance?
questions.motivation: What motivated you to sign up for MyFace?
questions.additionalNotes: Anything else you think we should know?

protocol.title: Photo Requirements
protocol.description: Confirm each guideline so your analysis meets standard protocol.
protocol.warning: Check all items to continue. Uploading without protocol (e.g. with glasses) reduces accuracy.

items.glasses: Take off any glasses and hat
items.lighting: Use natural, even lighting on your face
items.hair: Tie long hair back — face, neck and ears visible
items.filters: Don't use filters on the photo

upload.confirmationDescription: Please review and confirm the following photo guidelines to ensure accurate results.
upload.uploadDescription: You're almost done! Each photo is validated and saved securely as you add it.
upload.dragDropOrChoose: Drag and drop or Choose file upload
upload.qualityCheckFailed: This photo did not pass the quality checks.
upload.uploadAllRequired: * Upload all {count} required photos to continue ({uploaded}/{count})

guidelines.clearObstructions: Remove hair and obstructions from the face
guidelines.armsLength: Photo taken from an arm's length away
guidelines.oneHead: Only one head should be visible in the image
guidelines.notCropped: The head and neck are not cropped out
guidelines.notBlurry: Keep camera focused and not blurry

checklist.glassesHat: Take off any glasses and hat
checklist.lighting: Use natural, even lighting that illuminates your face directly
checklist.hair: Tie long hair back to clear up the face, neck and ears
checklist.filters: Don't use filters on the pictures

front.label: Front Face
front.hint: Entire face head-on with a neutral expression

leftProfile.label: Left Profile
leftProfile.hint: Left side profile — full face from the left

rightProfile.label: Right Profile
rightProfile.hint: Right side profile — full face from the right

smile.label: Smile
smile.hint: Smile naturally showing teeth — for smile shape & teeth analysis

topHead.label: Top of Head
topHead.hint: Tilt head down showing top of head & hairline — for hair density analysis

faceDetected.none: No face detected — face the camera directly
faceDetected.multiple: {count} faces detected — only one person allowed
faceDetected.limitedAngle: Face detection limited for this angle — proceeding

neutralExpression.mouthOpen: Mouth appears open — please use a neutral expression
neutralExpression.nonNeutral: Expression appears non-neutral — please relax your face

eyesOpen.closed: Eyes appear closed — please keep eyes open
eyesOpen.squinting: Eyes may be squinting — try opening them fully
eyesOpen.limitedAngle: Eye check limited for this angle

noGlasses.detected: Glasses detected — please remove for best results
noGlasses.possible: Possible glasses detected — remove if possible

hairClear.covering: Hair may be covering forehead — please clear hair from face
hairClear.partial: Hair may partially cover your face — push hair back if possible
hairClear.foreheadCovered: Forehead appears partially covered — ensure hair is away from face
hairClear.skippedTopHead: Hair check skipped for top-of-head photo

faceCentered.offCenter: Face is {direction} — center your face in the frame

faceSize.tooSmall: Face is too small — move closer to the camera
faceSize.small: Face is small — try moving closer for better accuracy

brightness.veryDark: Image is very dark — use better lighting

mediaPipe.unavailableAngle: Advanced checks unavailable for this angle

preparing.homeDescription: Your facial analysis is with our care team. Remaining time is based on your submission date.
